features: The information below applies to each unit in the pack

ELBOW GREASE ALL PURPOSE DEGREASER: Remove grease and oil stains with this extra-large bottle of All Purpose Degreaser, the miracle product from Elbow Grease, with thousands of positive reviews and happy customers. The all-purpose cleaning spray that has taken social media by storm and is a firm favourite of Mrs. Hinch, the social media sensation together with her army of Hinchers

VERSATILE USE: The Elbow Grease All-Purpose Degreaser is perfect for removing tough grease stains from kitchen and bathroom surfaces, fabrics, carpets, plastics and even engines and machinery. The spray has 1000s of uses for all around your home

UNIQUE FORMULA: This unique, solvent-free formula is gentle and safe to use for removing grease spots from delicate and coloured fabrics, yet tough enough to clean vehicle parts and metal surfaces including alloy wheels

FRESH SCENT: The Elbow Grease All-Purpose Degreaser not only keeps the surface perfectly clean and grease-free, but it leaves a heavenly fresh lemon scent in your kitchen and bathroom that lasts for hours
ABOUT THE PRODUCT: 1L bottle. Solvent-free. Not suitable for wood. Vegan friendly
description: Ingredients Less Than 5% Cationic Surfactants, Non-ionic Surfactants, Phosphates, Also Contains: Perfume, Limonene
